name: burst_source
description: Heterogeneous synthetic image source for multi_source_surge. Three shapes: steady (constant fps), bursty (sleeps mostly idle, fires N-frame bursts on demand via exchange{command:burst}), variable (fps varies sinusoidally between 0.5x and 1.5x of nominal). Each frame stamps {seq, src_tag} into the first 16 bytes; src_tag identifies the source instance for routing in inspect.cpp.

outputs.name: img
outputs.doc: WxH gray, first 8 bytes = uint64 LE seq, next 8 bytes = uint64 LE src_tag (FNV-1a hash of instance name)

exchange.doc: fire `count` frames as fast as possible (back-to-back). args: {count:int}
